summary: AWS Phase F Integration Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed (100%), all 3 new frontend pages load correctly with service status cards and navigation links working
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 new AWS Phase F services are properly implemented with lazy initialization pattern
All 3 frontend pages have correct data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation links correctly added to Tools dropdown with data-testid attributes
All services connect to real AWS in us-east-1 region and show 'Connected' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS Phase F (AI & Content Services, Messaging & Events, Infrastructure Services) is fully implemented and working. All 11 new services connect to real AWS in us-east-1. Frontend pages accessible at /aws-ai-content, /aws-messaging, /aws-infrastructure via Tools dropdown.

features_tested.AWS AI Content Status: PASSED - All 4 services (Translate, Polly, Textract, SageMaker) return connected status with us-east-1 region
features_tested.Translate Text: PASSED - Real translation working (English to Spanish tested)
features_tested.Translate Languages: PASSED - Returns list of supported languages
features_tested.Polly Voices: PASSED - Returns list of available TTS voices
features_tested.SageMaker Notebooks: PASSED - Returns notebook instances (empty list expected)
features_tested.SageMaker Models: PASSED - Returns model list (empty list expected)
features_tested.AWS Messaging Status: PASSED - All 4 services (Kinesis, SNS, SQS, EventBridge) return connected status
features_tested.AWS Infra Status: PASSED - All 3 services (Step Functions, ElastiCache, Neptune) return connected status
features_tested.Authentication Required: PASSED - All endpoints return 401/403 without auth
features_tested.Frontend AI Content Page: PASSED - Page loads with 4 status cards and 4 tabs
features_tested.Frontend Messaging Page: PASSED - Page loads with 4 status cards and 4 tabs
features_tested.Frontend Infrastructure Page: PASSED - Page loads with 3 status cards and 3 tabs
features_tested.Navigation Tools Dropdown: PASSED - Contains AI Content, Messaging & Events, Infrastructure links

expected_behavior_notes.Empty Lists: Some AWS resources (notebooks, state machines, etc.) may return empty lists if not created in AWS account - this is expected behavior
expected_behavior_notes.Connected Status: All 11 services show 'Connected' status indicating proper AWS SDK configuration
